data.name: Contoso_RequestHandlingSummary_Description
data.value: Highlights the next coordinator action for a service request using routing, SLA, approval, sync, and close-readiness signals.

data.name: Status_Description
data.value: Current processing status for the service request.

data.name: Severity_Description
data.value: Severity selected for the service request.

data.name: RoutedTeam_Description
data.value: Team selected by the routing/SLA rule.

data.name: Owner_Description
data.value: Current Dataverse owner of the service request.

data.name: SlaHours_Description
data.value: Resolution target in hours stamped by the routing plugin.

data.name: ApprovalStatus_Description
data.value: Approval state for requests that require manager review.

data.name: ExternalSyncStatus_Description
data.value: State of downstream external system synchronization.

data.name: ExternalSystemId_Description
data.value: Identifier returned by the external system after synchronization.

data.name: ResolutionSummary_Description
data.value: Resolution notes used to assess close readiness for high-severity requests.
